# VoiceIME v2.8.3

发布时间：2026-04-18

## 更新内容

- fix: polish smart pronunciation output device tip
- feat: add virtual pronunciation output device management
- feat: extend smart pronunciation audio routing
- feat: add system audio recording source for transcription
- docs: archive voxcpm quality hints openspec change
- feat: add voxcpm audio quality hints and log throttling
- feat: polish voxcpm reference audio ux and cache
- fix: polish voxcpm settings persistence and preview state
- docs: archive voxcpm 2.8.0 openspec change
- feat: polish voxcpm lifecycle and settings ux
- feat: add local voxcpm pronunciation provider
